title: lepachys purpurea
intro: Lepachys purpurea, also known as Purple Backed Leaf Insect, is a plant that is often mistaken for an insect due to its appearance, but it is actually a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Lepachys purpurea include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cold, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Lepachys purpurea is used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
